zh.lifeSummary: Edward Howell於大約1391年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。他於1409年與Mrs Edward Howell在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Howell于大约1391年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾。他于1409年与Mrs Edward Howell在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Howell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: in the Welsh border counties, from the Welsh male personal name Hywel ‘eminent’, popular since the Middle Ages particularly in honor of the great 10th-century law-giving Welsh king. The name may also arise from the Breton personal name Houuel, Huwel, Huwal, Howael, cognate with the Welsh name. Bretons were especially numerous in the eastern counties of England. See Powell .
English: perhaps from a Middle English personal name Huwel (spelled Howel), a shortening of Huwelot or Huelin (see Hewlett and Huling ), both pet forms of Middle English Huw (see Hugh ).
English: habitational name from Howell (Lincolnshire), from an uncertain initial element + Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’.

variants.name: Howle
meanings: English and Welsh:
variant of   Howell  .
variant of   Hole  .

variants.name: Howells
meanings: English and Welsh (Glamorgan): variant of Howell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent English -s.

English: perhaps occasionally a nickname for someone who was fearless, from Middle English houe, houwe ‘anxiety, fear’ (Old English hogu or hoga) + les ‘less’. If this has survived as a modern surname, its pronunciation has been influenced by that of the name in 1 above.
English: variant of   Holes  .

variants.name: Powell
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Hywel ‘son of Hywel’, a personal name meaning ‘eminent’ (see Howell ).
Irish: mainly of Welsh origin as in 1 above, but sometimes a surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phóil ‘son of the servant of Saint Paul’ (see Guilfoyle ).
English: variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

meanings: Gaelic equivalent of Edward .

en.lifeSummary: Edward Howell was born about 1391, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Mrs Edward Howell in 1409, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Howell est né environ 1391, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Mrs Edward Howell en 1409, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Howell wurde um 1391 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1409 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs Edward Howell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Howell è nato il circa 1391 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Mrs Edward Howell nel 1409, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Howellは約1391年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた。1409年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでMrs Edward Howellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Howell(은)는 대략 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Mrs Edward Howell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Howell nasceu aproximadamente 1391, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Mrs Edward Howell em 1409, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Howell родился около 1391 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Edward Howell в 1409 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Howell nació aproximadamente 1391, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Mrs Edward Howell en 1409, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
